query:
-- Add missing columns to badge_progress table
ALTER TABLE badge_progress 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS currentStreak INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS weekStart TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- Add BatchDialer fields to calls table
ALTER TABLE calls
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS callSource ENUM('ghl', 'batchdialer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ghl' AFTER tenantId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCallId INT UNIQUE AFTER ghlLocationId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCampaignId INT AFTER batchDialerCallId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerCampaignName VARCHAR(255) AFTER batchDialerCampaignId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS batchDialerAgentName VARCHAR(255) AFTER batchDialerCampaignName;
